arts.ttl: Hakan Calhanoglu remains with Turkey: Injury treatment underway
arts.sum: Inter Milan midfielder Hakan Calhanoglu is currently focused on his recovery after sustaining an injury while playing for the Turkish national team. Following a match against Wales, where he was substituted at halftime due to discomfort, Calhanoglu expressed concerns about his condition. “I felt a pinch in the same spot where I had experienced discomfort before, and I preferred not to take any risks. I will undergo an MRI on Sunday,” he stated. Initial examinations have indicated that Calhanoglu’s muscle issue may not be severe, providing some relief for both Inter and the Turkish national team. arts.ttl: Joe Rodon ready for landmark Wales cap after starring in bruising Turkey clash
arts.sum: The Leeds defender was named player of the match after the Dragons held on for a gutsy Nations League draw in Kayseri.
